use_cases: Indicating loading states during async operations
Displaying progress feedback during page transitions
Showing activity during data fetching in dashboards
Providing visual cues during form submissions
Enhancing user experience during API calls
ai_summary: A minimalist bouncing box loader component that features a single colored square performing a coordinated jump and rotation animation. The component uses custom CSS keyframe animations to create a dynamic 90-degree rotation while bouncing vertically, simulating a playful jumping motion. Designed as lightweight atomic feedback UI, it provides clear loading indication without distracting from content.
